name: oh-hermes
description: Arch-first Hermes Agent companion skills for brain, research, code, swarm, and guarded self-improvement workflows.

skills.name: oh-brain
skills.description: Use GBrain and Hermes memory deliberately before external research or long-running work.

skills.description: Current research workflow using AnySearch/GBrain with citations and private-data boundaries.

skills.name: oh-code
skills.description: Code execution workflow with backup, verification, and publish-safe reporting.

skills.name: oh-swarm
skills.description: Multi-agent task decomposition for Hermes Workspace or Hermes workers.

skills.name: oh-auto-improve
skills.description: Guarded self-improvement loop for skills, docs, and setup scripts.
